remaining_params.SpellDescription: Any time you could cast a sorcery, you may exile a nonland card from your hand with X time counters on it, where X is its mana value. If the exiled card doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever chaos ensues, remove two time counters from each suspended card you own.
